Title: [IS-JAR-WEB-2908][Success Unlink Device via Jarvis - L3] Verify if after success unlink, unlink record will display in Device History
Testing Phase: BE Regression, BE Sanity, Pre-Test, Post-Test
Test Steps:
1. Should have access on Jarvis Portal\\
2. Number should be L3\\ Step/s:\\
3. Log-in to Jarvis Portal\\
4. Go to Transaction History\\
5. Click Non-Fin then Select device Mangement checkbox in Available Transaction Types dropdown\\
6. Search a number\\
7. Click Device History Tab\\
8. Validate the result in table\\
Expected Result:
Unlinked device should display in Device History\\
Header 'link_ID' should be displayed under Device Information Tab\\
link_id value is link id from the list device API (link ID of the device to be unlink)\\
Header 'cxm_user_id' should be displayed under Device Information Tab\\
if unlink was initiated by cxm agent: cxm_user_id value = agent's ldap username (Sample: zjuan-d.cruz)\\
Header 'link_date' should be displayed under Device Information Tab\\
link_date" this is the date when the device was linked to another device..\\
Format:  MMMM DD, YYYY   HH:MM(AM/PM)\\
Header 'unlink_date' should be displayed under Device Information Tab\\
this is the date when the device was unlink to another device.\\
Format:  MMMM DD, YYYY   HH:MM(AM/PM)\\
sample: Aug 17, 2023  10:10AM"\\
Should be sorted by Link Date from oldest to latest

Title: [WEB]Validate if Adjustment Approver can upload csv file with 1000 mobtels
Pre Conditions:
1. The Gcash app is accessible.
2. The SDK should already be enabled for the programming of mobile applications.
3. The Gcash user Fully Verified (L3)
4. Should be connected to GP
5. Should have an access in GCBizadmin
6. Check the template for Test data need https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/12hvkJg3WAdN2hzgMCCykOAHfLD8TiYGoLeI_-Ne95ag/edit#gid=1766939058
7. Created 1,000 mobtels
8. Adjustment Approver account
Test Steps:
1. Login to Transaction Query Portal https://buservice-sit.saas.mynt.xyz/login.htm?goto=http%3A%2F%2Fgcbizadmin-sit.saas.mynt.xyz%2Ftransaction%2Fquery
2. Click Adjustment in the Left Panel
3. Go to Bulk Adjustment
4. Select Adjustment Type
5. Upload Bulk Adjustment with 1k mobtels CSV File Template
6. Click Next button
7. Click Submit button in Notes Page
8. Check if file is successfuly uploaded
Expected Result:
After success Upload of file , prompt should be “Successfully uploaded unbinding record/s.”
After success submission of the bulk unbinding request.
Redirect to new screen “Bulk Unbinding”
Change step title icon from 2 to check icon
Change the background color of Check Icon to blue.
Show the success page and the generated transaction reference number.
Sample:
Congratulations!
Your ticket ID is UB2026000021.
Check bulk unbinding query for ticket status.
Redirecting to Unbinding Detail Page in 5 seconds...
Unbinding Details Page should be hyperlink
User should redirect to the unbinding details page after 5seconds.
After waiting for 5secs
Redirect to new screen “Unbinding Details Page”
Section title “Ticket
”
Section Body fields
Filename should be the file name of the uploaded file
Merchant should be the merchant choose in Bulk unbinding.
Uploaded Timestamp should be the Date and time when the file is uploaded
format sample (Jan 14 2026 16:54:00)
Upload by should be the name and email of who uploaded the file
Total Entries should be the count of mobtels inside the file
Status should be Initiated
Response Code and Response Message should be -
Buttons should be present “Approve, Reject, Download and Back”
Records every page is 10 only
Should have pagination
1st Section tab is “Entries Details”
Merchant should be the merchant choose in Bulk unbinding.
Zendesk_Ticket should be the value in the raw file
Mobile Number should be the value in the raw file
Remarks default value is OK
Status should be Initiated
2nd Section tab is Notes
if you put notes in Bulk Unbinding it should have fetch the inputted value
if you did not put note in Bulk Unbinding default value should be “Not Provided”
3rd Section tab is Operation Log
Button should be present “Download Logs”
Action should have “Initiated and View”
Username should be the one who upload, view, approved, completed and rejected
Timestamp should be the date and time action done
format sample (Jan 14 2026 16:54:00)
Remarks and Status default value is -
Records every page is 10 only
Should have pagination

3. Go back to log-in\\ Step/s on Before Pagination\\

6. Click Non-Fin toggle button\\
7. on Available Transactions Type dropdown, check the box of DEVICE MANAGEMENT\\
8. on DEVICE MANAGEMENT screen, type the mobile number\\
9. Click search\\
10. Go to Device History tab\\
11. Check the records and pagination\\ Step/s for cronjob\\
12. Coordinate with the dev\\ Step/s on After Pagination\\
13. Go to Jarvis\\
14. Click Transaction History on Navigation Bar\\
15. Click Non-Fin toggle button\\
16. on Available Transactions Type dropdown, check the box of DEVICE MANAGEMENT\\
17. on DEVICE MANAGEMENT screen, type the mobile number\\
18. Click search\\
19. Go to Device History tab\\
20. Check the pagination behavior\\
Expected Result:
Page number should adjust\\
ex. user select page 2, pagination should be "First Page 2 3 4 5 6 7 Last Page"

Title: [IS-JAR-WEB-2919] [Success Unlink Device via App - L3] Verify if after success unlink, unlink record will display in Device History

this is the date when the device was unlink to another device.\\
Format:  MMMM DD, YYYY   HH:MM(AM/PM)\\
sample: Aug 17, 2023  10:10AM"\\
Should be sorted by Link Date from oldest to latest

Title: [IS-JAR-WEB-2945] [Success Link Device via Jarvis - iOS] After success Device Registration, registered device should display in Device Information tab

10. in Device Information\\

manufacturer value is the manufacturer of the mobile device\\
model value is the model name of the Gcash customer mobile device\\
os value is the operating system of the mobile device\\"
